passage_title: Case Study: Tourism New Zealand website

sentences.sentence: New Zealand is a small country of four million inhabitants, a long-haul flight from all the major tourist-generating markets of the world.
sentences.translation: 新西兰是一个只有四百万人口的小国，与世界上主要的旅游客源市场之间都隔着一段长途飞行的距离。

structure.text: a small country of four million inhabitants
a long-haul flight from all the major tourist-generating markets of the world

difficult_points: a long-haul flight...是同位语，补充说明新西兰与主要客源市场之间的距离感，而不是并列的第二个表语。
tourist-generating markets 指“产生游客的市场”，即客源国/地区。

sentences.sentence: Tourism currently makes up 9% of the country's gross domestic product, and is the country's largest export sector.
sentences.translation: 旅游业目前占该国国内生产总值的9%，是该国最大的出口部门。

structure.text: currently makes up 9% of the country's gross domestic product
and is the country's largest export sector

difficult_points: makes up 和 is 是并列谓语，共用主语 Tourism。
make up 表示“占（比例）”，而不是“组成、编造”。

sentences.sentence: Unlike other export sectors, which make products and then sell them overseas, tourism brings its customers to New Zealand.
sentences.translation: 与其他出口部门不同——那些部门生产产品然后运往海外销售——旅游业则是把顾客带到新西兰来。

structure.text: which make products and then sell them overseas
brings its customers to New Zealand

difficult_points: which 引导的定语从句插在 Unlike other export sectors 之后，修饰 other export sectors，说明它们通常的运作方式。
Unlike 引出对比，突出旅游业与其他出口部门在“卖产品”还是“带客户”上的根本不同。

sentences.sentence: The product is the country itself - the people, the places and the experiences.
sentences.translation: 旅游业的“产品”就是这个国家本身——它的人民、地方和各种体验。

structure.text: the people, the places and the experiences

difficult_points: 破折号后的三个并列名词短语是对 the country itself 的具体展开说明。
The product 承接上一句，指新西兰旅游业作为“出口产品”所卖的东西。

sentences.sentence: In 1999, Tourism New Zealand launched a campaign to communicate a new brand position to the world.
sentences.translation: 1999年，新西兰旅游局发起了一场宣传活动，向世界传达一种新的品牌定位。

structure.text: to communicate a new brand position to the world

difficult_points: to communicate...是不定式作目的状语，说明发起这场活动的目的。
a new brand position 指新西兰在这次活动中确立的全新品牌定位。

sentences.sentence: The campaign focused on New Zealand's scenic beauty, exhilarating outdoor activities and authentic Maori culture, and it made New Zealand one of the strongest national brands in the world.
sentences.translation: 这场活动聚焦于新西兰的自然风光、令人振奋的户外活动以及地道的毛利文化，使新西兰成为世界上最强大的国家品牌之一。

structure.text: focused on New Zealand's scenic beauty, exhilarating outdoor activities and authentic Maori culture
and it made New Zealand one of the strongest national brands in the world

difficult_points: it 指代前面的 The campaign，made 后接双宾语结构，New Zealand 是宾语，one of the strongest national brands 是宾语补足语。
focused 和 made 是并列谓语，共用主语 The campaign。

sentences.sentence: A key feature of the campaign was the website www.newzealand.com, which provided potential visitors to New Zealand with a single gateway to everything the destination had to offer.
sentences.translation: 这场活动的一个关键内容是网站www.newzealand.com，它为新西兰的潜在游客提供了一个统一的入口，通往这个目的地所能提供的一切。

structure.text: A key feature of the campaign
which provided potential visitors to New Zealand with a single gateway to everything the destination had to offer

difficult_points: which 引导的定语从句修饰 the website，说明这个网站的作用。
everything (that) the destination had to offer 中省略了关系代词 that，从句修饰 everything。

sentences.sentence: The heart of the website was a database of tourism service operators, both those based in New Zealand and those based abroad which offered tourism services to the country.
sentences.translation: 该网站的核心是一个旅游服务运营商数据库，既包括总部设在新西兰的运营商，也包括那些设在海外、为新西兰提供旅游服务的运营商。

structure.text: a database of tourism service operators
both those based in New Zealand and those based abroad
which offered tourism services to the country

difficult_points: both...and...并列结构补充说明 operators 包括的两类：本土的和海外的。
which 引导的定语从句只修饰紧挨着的 those based abroad，说明这些海外运营商的共同点。

sentences.sentence: Any tourism-related business could be listed by filling in a simple form.
sentences.translation: 任何与旅游相关的企业只需填写一份简单的表格，就可以被列入该网站。

structure.text: by filling in a simple form

difficult_points: by filling in 是介词加动名词，表示实现“被列入”这一结果的方式。
could be listed 是被动语态，强调企业“被收录”进数据库这一动作。

sentences.sentence: This meant that even the smallest bed and breakfast address or specialist activity provider could gain a web presence with access to an audience of long-haul visitors.
sentences.translation: 这就意味着，即使是最小的家庭旅馆或专业活动供应商，也能借此获得网络曝光，接触到大批长途游客。

structure.text: that even the smallest bed and breakfast address or specialist activity provider could gain a web presence with access to an audience of long-haul visitors
with access to an audience of long-haul visitors

difficult_points: This 指代上一句“只需填表即可被收录”这一做法。
even 强调“即使是最小的”企业也能获得同样的网络曝光机会。

sentences.sentence: In addition, because participating businesses were able to update the details they gave on a regular basis, the information provided remained accurate.
sentences.translation: 此外，由于参与的企业能够定期更新自己提供的信息，网站上的信息也就始终保持准确。

structure.text: because participating businesses were able to update the details they gave on a regular basis

difficult_points: the details (that) they gave 省略了关系代词，从句修饰 the details。
the information provided 中 provided 是过去分词作后置定语，修饰 information，即“所提供的信息”。

sentences.sentence: And to maintain and improve standards, Tourism New Zealand organised a scheme whereby organisations appearing on the website underwent an independent evaluation against a set of agreed national standards of quality.
sentences.translation: 而且，为了维持并提升标准，新西兰旅游局还组织了一项机制，让在网站上出现的机构接受一套公认的国家质量标准的独立评估。

structure.text: And to maintain and improve standards
whereby organisations appearing on the website underwent an independent evaluation against a set of agreed national standards of quality

difficult_points: to maintain and improve standards 是不定式作目的状语，位于句首。
whereby 引导定语从句修饰 a scheme，意为“凭借这一机制”，appearing on the website 是分词短语修饰 organisations。

sentences.sentence: As part of this, the effect of each business on the environment was considered.
sentences.translation: 作为这一评估的一部分，每家企业对环境的影响也被纳入考量。

structure.text: the effect of each business on the environment

difficult_points: this 指代前一句提到的独立评估机制。
was considered 是被动语态，强调环境影响“被纳入”评估范围。

sentences.sentence: To communicate the New Zealand experience, the site also carried features relating to famous people and places.
sentences.translation: 为了传达新西兰的旅行体验，该网站还刊载了与知名人物和地点相关的专题内容。

structure.text: To communicate the New Zealand experience
relating to famous people and places

difficult_points: To communicate...是不定式作目的状语，位于句首。
relating to 是现在分词短语作后置定语，修饰 features。

sentences.sentence: One of the most popular was an interview with former New Zealand All Blacks rugby captain Tana Umaga.
sentences.translation: 其中最受欢迎的内容之一，是对新西兰全黑队前橄榄球队长塔纳·乌马加的采访。

structure.text: an interview with former New Zealand All Blacks rugby captain Tana Umaga

difficult_points: One of the most popular 承接上一句的 features，指“这些专题内容中最受欢迎的一个”。
the most popular 后省略了 features，完整含义是“最受欢迎的专题内容之一”。

sentences.sentence: Another feature that attracted a lot of attention was an interactive journey through a number of the locations chosen for blockbuster films which had made use of New Zealand's stunning scenery as a backdrop.
sentences.translation: 另一个引起广泛关注的内容，是一场互动式的旅程，带领游客游览多部曾以新西兰壮丽风光为背景取景的大片拍摄地。

structure.text: that attracted a lot of attention
an interactive journey through a number of the locations
which had made use of New Zealand's stunning scenery as a backdrop

difficult_points: that attracted a lot of attention 是定语从句修饰主语 Another feature。
chosen for blockbuster films 是过去分词短语修饰 the locations，which 引导的定语从句进一步修饰 blockbuster films。

sentences.sentence: As the site developed, additional features were added to help independent travellers devise their own customised itineraries.
sentences.translation: 随着网站的发展，网站又添加了更多内容，帮助自由行游客制定属于自己的定制行程。

structure.text: to help independent travellers devise their own customised itineraries

difficult_points: As 在这里表示“随着”，引导时间状语从句。
to help...devise...是不定式作目的状语，help 后接不带 to 的不定式 devise。

sentences.sentence: To make it easier to plan motoring holidays, the site catalogued the most popular driving routes in the country, highlighting different routes according to the season and indicating distances and times.
sentences.translation: 为了让规划自驾游变得更容易，该网站整理了全国最受欢迎的自驾路线，按季节标出不同路线，并标明距离和所需时间。

structure.text: To make it easier to plan motoring holidays
catalogued the most popular driving routes in the country
highlighting different routes according to the season

difficult_points: To make it easier...是不定式作目的状语，it 是形式宾语，真正的宾语是 to plan motoring holidays。
highlighting...and indicating...是并列的现在分词短语，作伴随状语，说明网站整理路线时具体做了什么。

sentences.sentence: Later, a Travel Planner feature was added, which allowed visitors to click and 'bookmark' places or attractions they were interested in, and then view the results on a map.
sentences.translation: 后来，网站又新增了“旅行规划”功能，游客可以点击并“收藏”自己感兴趣的地点或景点，然后在地图上查看结果。

structure.text: which allowed visitors to click and 'bookmark' places or attractions they were interested in, and then view the results on a map

difficult_points: which 引导的定语从句修饰 a Travel Planner feature，说明这一功能的作用。
places or attractions (that) they were interested in 省略了关系代词，从句修饰 places or attractions。
allowed visitors to click...and (to) view...是并列的不定式短语，共用 to。

sentences.sentence: The Travel Planner offered suggested routes and public transport options between the chosen locations.
sentences.translation: 该规划功能会提供建议路线，以及所选地点之间的公共交通选择。

structure.text: suggested routes and public transport options between the chosen locations

difficult_points: the chosen locations 指用户在网站上已经点选/收藏的地点。
suggested routes and public transport options 是并列宾语，都是 The Travel Planner 提供的内容。

sentences.sentence: There were also links to accommodation in the area.
sentences.translation: 网站上还附有该地区住宿的相关链接。

structure.text: links to accommodation in the area

difficult_points: There were 是存在句结构，真正的信息中心是 links to accommodation。
in the area 指代前文提到的用户所选定的旅行地点周边区域。

sentences.sentence: By registering with the website, users could save their Travel Plan and return to it later, or print it out to take on the visit.
sentences.translation: 通过在网站上注册，用户可以保存自己的旅行计划并稍后再返回查看，或者打印出来带在旅途中使用。

structure.text: could save their Travel Plan and return to it later

difficult_points: By registering 是介词加动名词，表示实现后面一系列操作的前提条件。
save...and return...or print...三个并列谓语共用主语 users，to take on the visit 是不定式作目的状语，修饰 print it out。

sentences.sentence: The website also had a 'Your Words' section where anyone could submit a blog of their New Zealand travels for possible inclusion on the website.
sentences.translation: 网站还设有一个“你的文字”板块，任何人都可以在此提交自己新西兰之旅的博客，供网站考虑收录。

structure.text: where anyone could submit a blog of their New Zealand travels for possible inclusion on the website

difficult_points: where 引导的定语从句修饰 a 'Your Words' section，说明这个板块的用途。
for possible inclusion on the website 表示提交博客的目的，即“以便有可能被网站收录”。

sentences.sentence: The Tourism New Zealand website won two Webby awards for online achievement and innovation.
sentences.translation: 新西兰旅游局的网站曾荣获两项Webby奖，以表彰其在网络成就和创新方面的贡献。

structure.text: two Webby awards for online achievement and innovation

difficult_points: for online achievement and innovation 说明获奖所表彰的具体领域。
two Webby awards 承接前文，是对该网站获得外部认可的具体例证。

sentences.sentence: More importantly perhaps, the growth of tourism to New Zealand was impressive.
sentences.translation: 或许更重要的是，新西兰旅游业的增长令人印象深刻。

structure.text: the growth of tourism to New Zealand

difficult_points: More importantly perhaps 是插入的评注性状语，表明作者认为这一点比前面提到的获奖更值得关注。
perhaps 削弱了 more importantly 的绝对语气，体现作者谨慎的态度。

sentences.sentence: Overall tourism expenditure increased by an average of 6.9% per year between 1999 and 2004.
sentences.translation: 1999年至2004年间，旅游总支出平均每年增长6.9%。

structure.text: increased by an average of 6.9% per year

difficult_points: increase by 表示增长的幅度，接具体的百分比数字。
an average of 6.9% per year 说明这是1999至2004年间的年均增长率，而非总增长率。

sentences.sentence: From Britain, visits to New Zealand grew at an average annual rate of 13% between 2002 and 2006, compared to a rate of 4% overall for British visits abroad.
sentences.translation: 从英国出发前往新西兰的游客数量，在2002年至2006年间平均每年增长13%，相比之下，英国人出境旅游总体的年均增长率只有4%。

structure.text: grew at an average annual rate of 13%
compared to a rate of 4% overall for British visits abroad

difficult_points: compared to 是过去分词短语作状语，把新西兰的13%增速与英国人出境游整体4%的增速进行对比。
From Britain 修饰 visits，指“从英国出发的游客数量”，而不是修饰整个句子。

sentences.sentence: The website was set up to allow both individuals and travel organisations to create itineraries and travel packages to suit their own needs and interests.
sentences.translation: 该网站的设立，是为了让个人游客和旅行机构都能够根据自己的需求和兴趣，创建行程和旅游套餐。

structure.text: to allow both individuals and travel organisations to create itineraries and travel packages
to suit their own needs and interests

difficult_points: to allow...是不定式作目的状语，说明网站设立的目的；其中 both A and B 是 allow 的宾语。
to suit...是第二层不定式，说明创建行程套餐所要达到的效果。

sentences.sentence: On the website, visitors can search for activities not solely by geographical location, but also by the particular nature of the activity.
sentences.translation: 在网站上，游客不仅可以按地理位置搜索活动，还可以按活动的具体性质进行搜索。

structure.text: not solely by geographical location, but also by the particular nature of the activity

difficult_points: not solely...but also...是并列结构，说明搜索活动的两种方式，而不是排他关系。
by geographical location 和 by the particular nature of the activity 分别对应两种检索方式，均修饰 search for。

sentences.sentence: This is important as research shows that activities are the key driver of visitor satisfaction, contributing 74% to visitor satisfaction, while transport and accommodation account for the remaining 26%.
sentences.translation: 这一点很重要，因为研究表明，各类活动是游客满意度的关键驱动因素，占游客满意度的74%，而交通和住宿则占剩余的26%。

structure.text: as research shows that activities are the key driver of visitor satisfaction
that activities are the key driver of visitor satisfaction
while transport and accommodation account for the remaining 26%

difficult_points: as 在这里引导原因状语从句，意为“因为”。
contributing 74%...是现在分词短语，补充说明 activities 对满意度的具体贡献比例。
while 表示对比，将活动的74%与交通住宿的26%相对照。

sentences.sentence: The more activities that visitors undertake, the more satisfied they will be.
sentences.translation: 游客参与的活动越多，他们就会越满意。

structure.text: The more activities that visitors undertake
the more satisfied they will be

difficult_points: the more...the more...是“越……越……”的固定句式，表示两者程度同步变化。
activities that visitors undertake 中 that 引导定语从句修饰 activities，从句谓语 undertake 意为“从事、参与”。

sentences.sentence: It has also been found that visitors enjoy cultural activities most when they are interactive, such as visiting a marae (meeting ground) to learn about traditional Maori life.
sentences.translation: 研究还发现，当文化活动具有互动性时，游客最为享受，例如参观毛利人的聚会场地marae，了解传统的毛利生活。

structure.text: that visitors enjoy cultural activities most when they are interactive
such as visiting a marae (meeting ground) to learn about traditional Maori life

difficult_points: It has been found that...是形式主语结构，真正的内容是 that 引导的从句。
such as visiting...举例说明什么样的活动算作“互动性文化活动”。

sentences.sentence: Many long-haul travellers enjoy such learning experiences, which provide them with stories to take home to their friends and family.
sentences.translation: 许多长途游客喜欢这类学习性的体验，因为这能带给他们可以讲给亲友听的故事。

structure.text: which provide them with stories to take home to their friends and family
to take home to their friends and family

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 such learning experiences，补充说明这类体验带来的好处。
to take home...是不定式作后置定语，修饰 stories，说明这些故事的用途。

sentences.sentence: In addition, it appears that visitors to New Zealand don't want to be 'one of the crowd' and find activities that involve only a few people more special and meaningful.
sentences.translation: 此外，新西兰的游客似乎并不想成为“大众中的一员”，他们觉得只有少数人参与的活动更特别、更有意义。

structure.text: that visitors to New Zealand don't want to be 'one of the crowd' and find activities that involve only a few people more special and meaningful
that involve only a few people

difficult_points: it appears that...是形式主语结构，真正的内容是 that 引导的从句。
don't want to be...and find...是并列谓语，共用主语 visitors，find 后接宾语 activities 和宾语补足语 more special and meaningful。
that involve only a few people 是定语从句，修饰 activities。

sentences.sentence: It could be argued that New Zealand is not a typical destination.
sentences.translation: 可以说，新西兰并不是一个典型的旅游目的地。

structure.text: that New Zealand is not a typical destination

difficult_points: It could be argued that...是形式主语结构，it 代替后面 that 引导的从句。
could be argued 用情态动词加被动语态，语气委婉，表示这是一种可能的观点而非绝对结论。

sentences.sentence: New Zealand is a small country with a visitor economy composed mainly of small businesses.
sentences.translation: 新西兰是一个小国，其旅游经济主要由中小企业构成。

structure.text: a small country with a visitor economy

difficult_points: composed mainly of small businesses 是过去分词短语，修饰 a visitor economy，说明其构成。
with a visitor economy...是介词短语，作 a small country 的后置修饰语，补充说明这个国家的旅游经济特点。

sentences.sentence: It is generally perceived as a safe English-speaking country with a reliable transport infrastructure.
sentences.translation: 人们普遍认为新西兰是一个安全的英语国家，拥有可靠的交通基础设施。

structure.text: a safe English-speaking country with a reliable transport infrastructure

difficult_points: It 指代前文的 New Zealand。
be perceived as 表示“被认为是”，被动语态强调这是一种普遍看法。

sentences.sentence: Because of the long-haul flight, most visitors stay for longer (average 20 days) and want to see as much of the country as possible on what is often seen as a once-in-a-lifetime visit.
sentences.translation: 由于飞行路途遥远，大多数游客会停留更长时间（平均20天），并希望在这趟常被视为一生一次的旅行中，尽可能多地游览这个国家。

structure.text: and want to see as much of the country as possible
on what is often seen as a once-in-a-lifetime visit
what is often seen as a once-in-a-lifetime visit

difficult_points: stay...and want...是并列谓语，共用主语 most visitors。
as much of the country as possible 是“as...as possible”结构，表示“尽可能多地”。
what is often seen as...是 what 引导的名词性从句，作介词 on 的宾语，指代这次旅行本身。

sentences.sentence: However, the underlying lessons apply anywhere - the effectiveness of a strong brand, a strategy based on unique experiences and a comprehensive and user-friendly website.
sentences.translation: 然而，这些深层的经验适用于任何地方——一个强势品牌的有效性、一套基于独特体验的策略，以及一个全面且用户友好的网站。

structure.text: the effectiveness of a strong brand, a strategy based on unique experiences and a comprehensive and user-friendly website

difficult_points: 破折号后的三个并列名词短语是对 the underlying lessons 的具体说明，即这些经验具体指什么。
based on unique experiences 是过去分词短语，修饰 a strategy。
